description: SecurityInsight_PrivilegeTierClassifier -- v2.2 launcher for the privilege-tier-classifier engine.
notes: Invokes engine/privilege-tier-classifier/Invoke-PrivilegeTierClassifier.ps1. Builds the SecurityInsight tier-definitions JSON (AD groups + Entra roles + API permissions + Azure RBAC) using AI-batched tiering. Output to v2.2/privilege-tier-catalog/privilege-tier-catalog.custom.json. Customer config layered: LauncherConfig.defaults.ps1 -> SecurityInsight.custom.ps1 (config) -> LauncherConfig.custom.ps1 -> CLI args.
author: Morten Knudsen <mok@mortenknudsen.net>
